feedback.text: I truly believe Digital Fairness Act should be covering the assurance that a bought video game can't just be removed from my ownership, of course if it wasn't some foul play at hand by me like cheating. There should not be any other reason for a video to be removed or be rendered useless because the developers of a multiplayer based game decided to shut down servers without thinking about how much money was spent by the players on supporting the game, not having the insider info that their game will get shot down.
